meta.title: RentCar - Premium Car Rental Service in Sarajevo and across Bosnia
meta.description: Experience premium car rental standards with professional service and maximum flexibility. RentCar - your reliable travel partner.

hero.title: Reliable Car Rental in Sarajevo
hero.description: Affordable, clean and regularly maintained vehicles – fast and easy booking

form.car_type_placeholder: What vehicle are you looking for?

about.title: About Us
about.intro: We offer reliable and well-maintained vehicles for all your travel needs in Bosnia and Herzegovina. Our goal is to provide a simple, safe and professional vehicle rental experience.

card1.title: Choose a Vehicle
card1.text: Browse our selection and choose the vehicle that suits your needs.

card2.title: Contact Us or Send an Inquiry
card2.text: Write to us via the form, WhatsApp or call – we respond quickly.

card3.title: Confirm Your Booking
card3.text: We agree on the date, location and rental terms – quickly and transparently.

card4.title: Vehicle Pickup or Delivery
card4.text: Pickup at the agreed location or delivery to your address in BiH.

faq.title: FAQ - Frequently Asked Questions
faq.answer1: Yes, all vehicles have comprehensive insurance for maximum safety.
faq.question2: Can I drive the vehicle outside of Bosnia and Herzegovina?
faq.answer2: Yes, we allow driving abroad (e.g. Croatia and other regional countries), with prior arrangement.
faq.question3: How can I reserve a vehicle?
faq.answer3: You can make a reservation through the website or by direct contact.
faq.answer4: Yes, we deliver the vehicle to airports and any address in BiH.

testimonial1.text: Excellent service and professional approach. Highly recommended.
testimonial1.author: Satisfied Customer

testimonial2.text: Simple, fast and reliable – exactly what you need when traveling.
testimonial2.author: Satisfied Customer

testimonial3.text: Great vehicles and flexible conditions. We will definitely use the services again.
testimonial3.author: Satisfied Customer

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have a question or want to reserve a vehicle? Write to us and we will respond as soon as possible.

footer.brand_description: All our vehicles are fully insured, regularly maintained and ready for safe and comfortable travel.
